vllm.title: [Bugfix] Fix RobertaModel loading
vllm.author: NickLucche
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Fix #11821.
Additionally,  I test support for https://huggingface.co/sentence-transformers/stsb-roberta-base-v2 as an alternative model that can be used for embedding.
I wanted to include it because I found some inconsistencies in the naming of some popular Roberta's variants layers on the web, some

vllm.title: [V1] Avoid sending text prompt to core engine
vllm.author: ywang96
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
The original text prompt is already tokenized in the processing process and thus should not be needed in the core engine (since everything is done with token IDs on the engine).
I ran a mini benchmark with an extreme case to see the perf impact:
from vllm.v1.engine import EngineCoreRequest
from vllm
